events.agenda: Inaugural Dubai dbt Meetup covering data management fundamentals via a memorable analogy and data modeling for big data.

events.agenda: A social evening for the Dubai dbt community to network, with no formal talks.
events.event_description: An evening of socializing and knowledge sharing for members of the Dubai dbt community.
events.location: The Black Sheep, Pullman Hotel, Dubai
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jul 31, 2024 · 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM GST

The Black Sheep, Pullman Hotel, Dubai

dbt Dubai Summer Social

Join us for an evening of socialising and knowledge sharing. It's a great opportunity to meet other members of the dbt Dubai community to discuss data and more! Note: There will not be speakers at this event.
